title: Task Envelope — Anti-Loop Safeguard
description: Standalone envelope for completion loop tracking. Wraps a task_id reference with TTL, hysteresis, and backflow detection metadata. Used by the Gemini orchestrator to drive the inner completion loop.

id.description: Unique envelope ID or reference to task_id from task-blueprint

task_id_ref.description: Optional reference to a full task blueprint task_id

hops.description: Current hop count — incremented on each retry

state_hashes.description: SHA-256 hashes of file state at each hop boundary. If new hash matches any previous hash, backflow is detected and task is blocked.

consecutive_failures.description: Incremented on FAIL/RETRY. At 3: escalate to ARCHITECT. Reset to 0 on success.

consecutive_successes.description: Incremented on PASS. At 2: de-escalate from ARCHITECT to EXECUTE. Reset to 0 on failure.

escalated.description: Sticky flag: true when task has entered ARCHITECT mode via hysteresis

session_ids.description: All Claude Code session IDs used across hops

mcp_cache_key.description: Key for brain-damage-prevention context in Gemini MCP cache

last_hop_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of most recent hop
